description: Promotes mobile app ordering by encouraging followers to scan a QR code displayed in-venue to access the restaurant's ordering application.
structural_recipe: Display a clear, scannable QR code in the post (preferably in-store on door or signage) and include a caption that instructs followers to scan it to access the brand's mobile ordering app. Emphasize convenience and app-exclusive benefits. Keep the QR code centered and unobstructed for easy camera recognition.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers increasingly adopt mobile-first ordering due to convenience and contactless transactions. QR codes bridge offline-to-digital experiences, reducing friction in the customer journey. This pattern leverages tech-savvy audiences who value efficiency and modern payment solutions.
transplantation_caveats: QR code visibility depends on image quality and resolution—ensure adequate contrast and size
Some older demographics may lack familiarity with QR scanning; provide alternative ordering methods
App must be intuitive and available on both iOS and Android to avoid user drop-off
Geolocation-specific promotions may require localized app versions for different regions
